baby_trigon_egg.title: Claim the Baby Ender Trigon egg from the Ender Trigon's loot

baby_trigon_tame.title: Hatch and tame the Baby Ender Trigon (follow Ender Trigon mod taming instructions)

subtitle.text: You killed its parent. It is still willing to follow you. Consider what that means.

description: The Baby Ender Trigon is a tameable companion dropped by the Ender Trigon.
The egg follows the same hatch ritual as other dragon eggs — consult the Ender Trigon mod.
Likely requires specific biome conditions or ritual items.
Feed the hatchling appropriate End materials to bond it.
The baby grows over time into a full companion dragon.
It can fly. It can fight. It is loyal.
This is not a casual mechanic.
You killed the strongest thing in this dimension.
The baby Trigon is the closest thing this modpack has to an animal companion.
The Dracolotl in Ch04 was a companion. The baby Trigon is an heir.
→ Claim the Baby Ender Trigon egg [check]
